confluence_defs.name: HTF Bias
confluence_defs.desc: Higher-timeframe (1h–daily) EMA stack sets the only permitted direction.

confluence_defs.name: Fair Value Gap
confluence_defs.desc: An unmitigated 3-candle institutional imbalance price is returning to.

confluence_defs.name: Value Area
confluence_defs.desc: Entry at the Value Area Low (calls) / High (puts) from the volume profile.

confluence_defs.name: Structure + Sweep
confluence_defs.desc: A liquidity sweep then Change-of-Character / Break-of-Structure confirms.

confluence_defs.name: Fibonacci OTE
confluence_defs.desc: Price in the 61.8–78.6% Optimal Trade Entry zone or 50% equilibrium.

confluence_defs.name: Order Block
confluence_defs.desc: An unmitigated order block overlapping the FVG (the 'Unicorn' model).
